arcade.name: Millrace Arcade
arcade.summary: Playable browser games from Millrace, led by Corebound's v0.3.0 Deep Charter expansion.

games.title: Corebound
games.summary: Sign Deep Charters, route through late-run choir trench branches, and extract with anchor recall while contracts, archive sets, Survey relay upgrades, scanner sweeps, route beacons, and coolant bursts push progression beyond ore profit.

release.label: v0.3.0 Deep Charter
release.copy: Deep Charters now bind run constraints to relay rewards, opening charter-gated late routes, choir trench recovery targets, route value bonuses, and anchor recall extraction on top of the contract/archive foundation.

versions.label: v0.3.0 Deep Charter
versions.summary: Deep Charters, late routes, choir trench rewards, and anchor recall extend the Corebound run beyond the v0.2.0 contract/archive foundation.

versions.label: v0.2.0 continuity
versions.summary: Contracts, archive sigils, relay reputation, scanner sweeps, route beacons, and coolant support now connect the mine run to visible long-term progression.
